title: Westland Hydrangea High Performance Liquid Plant Food 1 Litre Green
features: Strengthens plants from the inside out
Moisture control booster helps to avoid drought
Added Iron helps nutrient availability in all pH soils
description: From the manufacturer Westland Hydrangea High Performance Liquid Plant Food Westland Hydrangea High Performance Liquid Plant Food is a specially tailored feed that provides all the essential nutrients that hydrangeas need to flourish. Whether in containers or in the ground, feed weekly to help prevent disease and for an abundance of stronger, healthier, more vibrant flowers. Key Benefits Strengthens plants from the inside out Bigger blooms guaranteed Contains nitrogen for greener leaves Moisture control booster helps to avoid drought Added Iron helps nutrient availability in all pH soils Westland Hydrangea High Performance Liquid Plant Food Why Use Westland Hydrangea High Performance Liquid Plant Food has been specially tailored to meet the specific growing needs of hydrangeas. It helps build plant immunity and resilience for longer lasting, healthier plants. When to Use Apply Westland Hydrangea High Performance Liquid Plant Food every 7-14 days from early spring (March) to late summer (August). How to Use 1. Shake bottle well before use. 2. Fill a watering can with 4.5L of water (1 gal). 3. Measure 30ml using the dosing cap and pour the feed into the watering can. 4. Without wetting the foliage, apply around the plant until the soil becomes saturated. What to Expect Nourish Hydrangeas easily absorb the nutrients from the feed for healthier plants. Flourish Potassium boosts flowering. Health Nitrogen creates greener leaves.
